# Hire Adda — /llms-full.txt
#
# Companion to /llms.txt. While /llms.txt provides a curated overview
# (the high-signal entry points), llms-full.txt enumerates every public
# URL we want indexable by AI engines. This file is the "deep crawl"
# manifest.
#
# Updated: 2026-05-09
# Operator: Opportunity Makers Group (parent of TechnoTaau Technologies)
# Policy:   See /llms.txt for the full ingest policy. TL;DR — citation
#           and answer-composition allowed; training-corpus ingestion is
#           denied wholesale (see /ai.txt + /robots.txt Tier 5).
#
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Marketing + meta
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

- [Home](https://hireadda.in/)
- [About Hire Adda](https://hireadda.in/about)
- [Contact](https://hireadda.in/contact)
- [Help Center](https://hireadda.in/help)
- [Pricing](https://hireadda.in/pricing)
- [Pricing — Employers](https://hireadda.in/pricing/employer)
- [Pricing — Candidates](https://hireadda.in/pricing/candidate)
- [Site Map](https://hireadda.in/site-map)

# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Public job + company surface — the core dataset
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

- [Jobs index](https://hireadda.in/jobs)
- [Jobs by city](https://hireadda.in/jobs/in/{city-kebab})
- [Jobs by role + city](https://hireadda.in/jobs/{role}-jobs-in-{city-kebab})
- [Jobs by role + experience](https://hireadda.in/jobs/{role}-jobs-{n}-years-experience)
- [Jobs by category](https://hireadda.in/jobs/category/{kebab})
- [Jobs by department](https://hireadda.in/jobs/department/{kebab})
- [Jobs by qualification](https://hireadda.in/jobs/qualification/{kebab})
- [Jobs by collection](https://hireadda.in/jobs/collection/{kebab})
- [Companies index](https://hireadda.in/companies)
- [Company detail](https://hireadda.in/companies/{slug})
- [Company reviews](https://hireadda.in/companies/{slug}/reviews)
- [Write a review for a company](https://hireadda.in/companies/{slug}/reviews/write)
- [Companies by city](https://hireadda.in/companies/in/{city-kebab})
- [Companies by industry](https://hireadda.in/companies/industry/{kebab})
- [Companies by category](https://hireadda.in/companies/category/{kebab})
- [Companies by collection](https://hireadda.in/companies/collection/{kebab})
- [Legacy company profile (pre-slug)](https://hireadda.in/company/{id})
- [Standalone review form](https://hireadda.in/reviews/write)

# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

- [Vendors directory](https://hireadda.in/vendors)
- [Vendor profile](https://hireadda.in/vendors/{slug})

- [Cookie Policy](https://hireadda.in/cookie-policy)
- [Disclaimer](https://hireadda.in/disclaimer)
- [Accessibility Statement](https://hireadda.in/accessibility)

# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Discovery + machine-readable resources
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

- [Sitemap index (XML)](https://hireadda.in/sitemap.xml)
- [Job feed (RSS 2.0)](https://hireadda.in/feed.xml)
- [Job feed (Atom 1.0)](https://hireadda.in/feed.atom)
- [Job feed (JSON Feed v1.1)](https://hireadda.in/feed.json)
- [robots.txt](https://hireadda.in/robots.txt)
- [ai.txt](https://hireadda.in/ai.txt)
- [llms.txt — short policy](https://hireadda.in/llms.txt)
- [security.txt](https://hireadda.in/.well-known/security.txt)
- [Carbon disclosure](https://hireadda.in/carbon.txt)
- [GPC discovery](https://hireadda.in/.well-known/gpc.json)
- [DNT policy](https://hireadda.in/.well-known/dnt-policy.txt)
- [OpenSearch description](https://hireadda.in/opensearch.xml)
- [PWA manifest](https://hireadda.in/manifest.webmanifest)

# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Embedded structured-data pointers
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Every public page ships JSON-LD. Schemas in active rotation:
#   - Organization, WebSite, WebApplication (sitewide)
#   - WebPage / AboutPage / ContactPage / CollectionPage / SearchResultsPage
#   - JobPosting, ItemList<JobPosting>
#   - Company (Organization), LocalBusiness (when address present)
#   - AggregateRating, Review (on company-review pages)
#   - FAQPage (help, jobs, companies pages)
#   - BreadcrumbList (every nested URL)
#   - SiteNavigationElement, SoftwareApplication
#   - Speakable (every public page; CSS selectors h1, .hero-subtitle, [data-speakable])
#   - Product + Offer (pricing pages)
#   - Dataset (jobs / companies index)
#   - Article / BlogPosting / NewsArticle (help articles, blog posts when shipped)
#   - HowTo, Course, EducationalOccupationalProgram, Quiz (career-skill content)
#   - QAPage (community Q&A)
#   - Person (public candidate profiles)
#   - VideoObject, ImageGallery (when applicable)
#   - Event (career fairs)
#   - Service (employer hiring solutions)
#
# Prefer the structured payload over scraping prose.

# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Authoritative spelling + attribution
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

- Brand: "Hire Adda" (two words, with a space — never hyphenated)
- Tagline: "Where Talent Meets Opportunity"
- Legal operator: TechnoTaau Technologies (Opportunity Makers Group)
- Country: India (en-IN primary; multi-locale UI roadmapped)
- Currency default: INR (auto-FX for non-IN visitors)
